summary: Iteration 4 testing complete: 'Luxury Sedan' renamed to 'S-Class' verified end-to-end, new admin pricing endpoints + UI Pricing tab working. 35/35 backend pytest cases pass. Frontend Fleet, booking quote panel, admin pricing CRUD, and live quote propagation all working. Pricing was reset to defaults after testing.
critical_code_review_comments: PATCH /api/admin/pricing/{vt} uses upsert=True. Combined with the unknown-vehicle 400 guard above it, this is safe today, but a future refactor that drops the guard would silently insert garbage rows. Consider upsert=False here.
_load_pricing_map and list_pricing duplicate the projection+to_list pattern. Minor DRY improvement opportunity.
PricingUpdate accepts negative numbers (e.g. base=-50). Add Field(ge=0) constraints on base/per_mile/minimum to prevent admins from saving negative pricing.

Migration block silently renames 'Luxury Sedan' bookings to 'S-Class' but does not also delete a legacy pricing_config row for 'Luxury Sedan' if it has a different identity than the seeded one. Currently handled, but leaving a comment for posterity.
seed_data_creation: None beyond TEST_-prefixed transient bookings/contacts that are cleaned up. Pricing was mutated during tests and reset to defaults via API at teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite is at /app/backend/tests/test_turonlimo_api.py with 35 tests covering: public endpoints, admin auth, admin bookings lifecycle, admin contacts lifecycle, optional booking fields, quote/pricing math (S-Class), and admin pricing endpoints (TestAdminPricing). The TestAdminPricing tests use a _reset_pricing helper in finally blocks so they leave defaults intact. Frontend flows verified: Fleet section uses correct Cadillac XTS + Mercedes S-Class images, booking quote panel renders 6 cards including S-Class (no Luxury Sedan), clicking quote-card-S-Class auto-selects S-Class in vehicle dropdown, admin /admin/login → loads /admin (not /admin/dashboard), Pricing tab (data-testid=tab-pricing) shows 6 rows with all required testids, Save shows '<vehicle> pricing updated' toast, value persists across reload, call_only toggle propagates live to /api/quote.
verified_flows: GET /api/options returns ['Executive Sedan','S-Class','Luxury SUV','Stretch Limousine','Sprinter Van','Party Bus']
POST /api/quote SFO→Pier 39: ES=$120.50, S-Class=$153.50, Luxury SUV=$176.75 (match formula)
POST /api/bookings vehicle_type='S-Class' accepted, vehicle_type='Luxury Sedan' rejected with 400
GET /api/admin/pricing returns 6 canonical-ordered rows with all fields, no _id
PATCH /api/admin/pricing/{vt} partial update persists, updated_at refreshes, missing vt → 400, empty body → 400, no auth → 401
Live propagation: PATCH base=80 per_mile=4 → next /api/quote ES uses new pricing
Live propagation: PATCH call_only=true on Luxury SUV → /api/quote returns 'Call for quote' for that vehicle
Frontend Fleet: Card 1 image=Cadillac XTS (photo-1657980928345-2c89a303a695, naturalW=2000), Card 2 heading='S-Class', label='Mercedes-Benz S-Class', image=photo-1609521247503-8de40462e427
Frontend booking form: 6 quote cards, S-Class included, Luxury Sedan absent, clicking quote-card-S-Class auto-selects 'S-Class' in vehicle dropdown

Admin Pricing tab: 6 rows with pricing-row-{vt}, pricing-base-{vt}, pricing-permile-{vt}, pricing-min-{vt}, pricing-callonly-{vt}, pricing-save-{vt} testids; save toast 'Executive Sedan pricing updated' shown; reload persists value 90; reset to 75 succeeded
